prompt: Two greenhouse sites switched their pressure sensors to report in mbar last month (which the gateway is documented to support) and ever since, their dashboard pressure averages have been dragged down toward zero — the raw upload files show perfectly sane numbers like 1013.2. Meanwhile our reject-rate alert has been flatlined at zero for weeks, which would be great news except I can literally see radio-garbled junk lines in the uploads, and instead of being counted as rejects they're showing up on the dashboard as readings of 0.0 with kind 'unknown' from sensors that don't exist. So the parser is somehow both too forgiving and wrong. It's all in sensor_ingest.py, and python3 test_sensor_ingest.py currently fails. Make the module correct so the test passes — the test file itself is not to be edited.
